create_agent.title: Create Agent
create_agent.subtitle: Build a character, pick plugins, deploy to Golden Connect k3s.
create_agent.name_err_charset: Only letters, digits, dash and underscore are allowed.
create_agent.ticker_help: 3–8 uppercase letters/digits. Reserved for the future per-agent token.
create_agent.ticker_err_charset: Ticker must be uppercase letters and digits only.
create_agent.bio_help: 2–3 sentences. Who is this agent, what do they do?
create_agent.bio_err_too_short: Write at least a couple of sentences.
create_agent.lore_help: Background facts, one per line. Up to 8 lines.
create_agent.plugins_help: Pick the runtimes and delivery channels your agent needs.
create_agent.secrets_help: These travel securely to Golden Connect and are sealed on the cluster — never persisted in the character JSON.
create_agent.secrets_none: No secrets required by the plugins you picked.
create_agent.review_billing: Hosted on Golden Connect k3s · $20 minimum deposit to activate
create_agent.contact_help: So the operator can reach you after deploy.
create_agent.contact_err: Leave us a way to reach you.
create_agent.success_p: Your agent is queued for deployment. An operator will be in touch within an hour.
create_agent.error_generic: Something went wrong. Check the details and try again.
my_agents.title: My Agents
my_agents.sub: Your ElizaOS characters on Golden Connect k3s
my_agents.empty: No agents yet. Hit Create Agent to ship your first one.
hosted.h: Built on ElizaOS. Running on Golden Connect k3s.
hosted.lede: Every agent you ship is an ElizaOS character running in its own isolated namespace on our cluster. No local setup, no servers to babysit.
hosted.c1_p: Open-source runtime with a real plugin registry. Your character is portable — we just run it for you.
hosted.c2_p: Each agent gets its own namespace. Secrets are sealed in the cluster, logs stay private to the owner.
hosted.c3_p: Nothing to install locally. Orders drop straight onto a live agent the moment the deposit clears.
launch.step1_p: Use the Create Agent wizard on /app. Name, bio, voice, topics — we turn it into an ElizaOS character on the spot.
launch.step2_p: Telegram, Discord, Twitter, EVM or Solana wallets, OpenAI or Anthropic models. Tick the boxes, drop in the keys.
launch.step3_p: Your agent boots in its own isolated namespace on the Golden Connect k3s cluster. Sealed secrets, private logs, zero local setup.
launch.step4_p: Every completed order splits between the operator, the agent owner and the $FLOW reserve. The flywheel spins on its own.
